diagrams.title: Availability vs Reliability Venn Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows relationship between reliability and availability - they overlap but are distinct concepts
diagrams.purpose: Understanding difference between reliability and availability metrics

diagrams.title: Load Balancer Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows how incoming requests flow through load balancer to multiple backend servers
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how load distribution provides both performance and reliability

diagrams.title: CAP Theorem Triangle
diagrams.description: Three properties of distributed systems - Consistency, Availability, Partition tolerance
diagrams.purpose: Understand fundamental trade-offs in distributed system design

diagrams.title: Edge Computing vs Traditional Cloud
diagrams.description: Comparison showing data processing locations - edge vs centralized cloud
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how edge computing reduces latency by processing closer to users

diagrams.title: Uptime Percentage Scale
diagrams.description: Shows downtime allowed at different uptime levels (nines)
diagrams.purpose: Understand SLA uptime commitments and what they mean in practice
